description:
Create column Imprint_clean at index 10 based on column Imprint using expression grel:if(
  isBlank(value),
  null,
  value.unescape("html")
       .replace(/\s+/, " ")
       .trim()
)

Text transform on cells in column Imprint_clean using expression grel:if(
  isBlank(value),
  null,
  value.replace(/\s*:\s*/, " : ")
       .replace(/\s*;\s*/, "; ")
       .replace(/\s+,/, ",")
       .replace(/,\s*/, ", ")
       .replace(/\s+\./, ".")
       .replace(/\s+/, " ")
       .trim()
)
Text transform on cells in column Publication_year using expression value.toNumber()
Text transform on cells in column Year_end using expression value.toNumber()

Create column Place_before_colon at index 11 based on column Imprint_clean using expression grel:if(
  isBlank(value),
  null,
  value.partition(":")[0]
       .replace(/^\s*\[/, "")
       .replace(
         /,?\s*\[?\s*(?:c\.?\s*)?(?:1[5-9]\d{2}|20\d{2})\??\.?\s*\]?\s*\.?\s*$/,
         ""
       )
       .trim()
)

expression:
grel:if(
  isBlank(value),
  null,
  with(
    value.partition(":"),
    parts,
    if(
      parts[1] == "",
      null,
      parts[2]
        .replace(
          /,?\s*\[?\s*(?:c\.?\s*)?(?:1[5-9]\d{2}|20\d{2})\??\.?\s*\]?\s*\.?\s*$/,
          ""
        )
        .replace(/^\s*\[/, "")
        .replace(/\]\s*$/, "")
        .trim()
    )
  )
)

Text transform on cells in column Publication_place using expression grel:if(
  isBlank(value),
  null,
  value.replace(/^\s*\[/, "")
       .replace(/,\s*\]\s*$/, "")
       .replace(/\]\s*$/, "")
       .replace(/\s+/, " ")

)

Text transform on cells in column Publication_place using expression grel:if(
  isBlank(value),
  null,
  value.replace(/\s*\[\s*printed\s*\]/i, "")
       .replace(/\s+printed\b/i, "")
       .replace(/\s+,/, ",")
       .replace(/\s+/, " ")
       .trim()
)

Create column Publisher_candidate at index 12 based on column Place_after_colon using expression grel:if(
  isBlank(value),
  null,
  value.unescape("html")
       .replace(/^\s*\[/, "")
       .replace(/\]\s*$/, "")
       .replace(/\s+/, " ")
       .trim()
)

expression:
grel:with(
  cells["Place_before_colon"].value,
  before,
  with(
    cells["Place_after_colon"].value,
    after,
    with(
      if(
        isBlank(before),
        null,
        if(
          isBlank(after),
          before,
          if(
            or(
              before.toLowercase().contains("company"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("publisher"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("printer"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("press"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("society"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("sons"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("bros"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("co.")
            ),
            after,
            before
          )
        )
      ),
      candidate,
      if(
        isBlank(candidate),
        null,
        candidate
          .replace("[printed]", "")
          .replace("[printed", "")
          .replace(" printed", "")
          .trim()
      )
    )
  )
)

expression:
grel:with(
  cells["Place_before_colon"].value,
  before,
  with(
    cells["Place_after_colon"].value,
    after,
    with(
      cells["Publisher_clean"].value,
      publisher,
      if(
        or(isBlank(before), isBlank(after), isBlank(publisher)),
        value,
        if(
          publisher.trim().toLowercase() == after.trim().toLowercase(),
          if(
            or(
              before.toLowercase().contains("co."),
              before.toLowercase().contains("company"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("sons"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("& son"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("printer"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("author"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("publisher"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("society"),
              before.toLowercase().contains("proprietor")
            ),
            after.replace("[", "").replace("]", "").trim(),
            value
          ),
          value
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
